editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 23 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 23 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: National Broadcasting Day — 23 July
articles.summary: National Broadcasting Day marks the first organised radio broadcast in India on 23 July 1927 from Bombay by the Indian Broadcasting Company.
articles.summary_hi: राष्ट्रीय प्रसारण दिवस भारत में 23 जुलाई 1927 को बॉम्बे से Indian Broadcasting Company की पहली संगठित रेडियो प्रसारण को चिह्नित करता है।
articles.content:
National Broadcasting Day is observed in India on 23 July. On this day in 1927, the Indian Broadcasting Company (IBC) began organised radio broadcasting from its Bombay station.

The service later evolved into the Indian State Broadcasting Service and was renamed All India Radio (AIR) in 1936. The name Akashvani was adopted in 1956. AIR’s motto is ‘Bahujana Hitaya, Bahujana Sukhaya’.

Radio has played a major role in education, agriculture advisories, disaster alerts, and national integration, especially in rural India.

For IB ACIO: date (23 July), year (1927), AIR (1936), and Akashvani (1956).
articles.content_hi:
23 जुलाई 1927 — Bombay से IBC रेडियो प्रसारण।

1936 में All India Radio। 1956 में Akashvani नाम। ध्येय: बहुजन हिताय, बहुजन सुखाय।

IB ACIO: 23 July, 1927, AIR 1936 — याद रखें।
articles.question: National Broadcasting Day in India is observed on:
articles.question_hi: भारत में राष्ट्रीय प्रसारण दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: It is observed on 23 July to mark the 1927 Bombay radio broadcast.
articles.explanation_hi: 1927 के बॉम्बे रेडियो प्रसारण की याद में 23 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Vividh Bharati was launched in 1957. Doordarshan later became India’s public TV broadcaster.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Vividh Bharati 1957। बाद में Doordarshan सार्वजनिक टीवी प्रसारक बना।

articles.title: Lokmanya Bal Gangadhar Tilak Jayanti — 23 July
articles.title_hi: लोकमान्य बाल गंगाधर तिलक जयंती — 23 जुलाई
articles.summary: Tilak Jayanti marks the birth of Lokmanya Bal Gangadhar Tilak (23 July 1856) — freedom fighter known for ‘Swaraj is my birthright’.
articles.summary_hi: तिलक जयंती लोकमान्य बाल गंगाधर तिलक (23 जुलाई 1856) की जयंती — ‘Swaraj is my birthright’ के लिए प्रसिद्ध।
articles.content:
Lokmanya Bal Gangadhar Tilak was born on 23 July 1856 in Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. He was a leading figure of the Indian freedom struggle and was called the ‘Father of Indian Unrest’ by the British.

His famous slogan: ‘Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it.’ He published Kesari (Marathi) and The Mahratta (English). He popularised Ganesh Utsav and Shivaji Jayanti as public festivals to build national unity.

Tilak was part of the Lal-Bal-Pal trio (Lala Lajpat Rai, Bal Gangadhar Tilak, Bipin Chandra Pal) of assertive nationalism.

For IB ACIO: birth 23 July 1856, Swaraj slogan, Kesari/Mahratta, Lal-Bal-Pal.
articles.content_hi:
जन्म: 23 जुलाई 1856, रत्नागिरी। नारा: स्वराज मेरा जन्मसिद्ध अधिकार है।

केसरी व The Mahratta। लाल-बाल-पाल त्रयी।

IB ACIO: 23 July 1856, Swaraj slogan — याद रखें।
articles.question: Lokmanya Tilak’s famous slogan was:
articles.question_hi: लोकमान्य तिलक का प्रसिद्ध नारा क्या था?
options: Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it
options_hi: स्वराज मेरा जन्मसिद्ध अधिकार है और मैं इसे लेकर रहूँगा
articles.explanation: Tilak’s iconic slogan was ‘Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it’.
articles.explanation_hi: तिलक का प्रसिद्ध नारा था — ‘स्वराज मेरा जन्मसिद्ध अधिकार है और मैं इसे लेकर रहूँगा’।
articles.moreInfo: ‘Do or Die’ — Gandhi (Quit India). ‘Inquilab Zindabad’ — Bhagat Singh/Hasrat Mohani association in popular memory.
articles.moreInfo_hi: ‘करो या मरो’ — गांधी। ‘इंकलाब जिंदाबाद’ — भगत सिंह से जुड़ा।

articles.title: Prasar Bharati — India’s Public Broadcaster
articles.title_hi: प्रसार भारती — भारत का सार्वजनिक प्रसारक
articles.summary: Prasar Bharati is the autonomous public service broadcaster of India, covering All India Radio and Doordarshan.
articles.summary_hi: प्रसार भारती भारत का स्वायत्त सार्वजनिक सेवा प्रसारक — All India Radio और Doordarshan।
articles.content:
Prasar Bharati was established under the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation of India) Act, 1990 and came into effect in 1997 as an autonomous body.

It comprises All India Radio (Akashvani) and Doordarshan. The aim is public-service broadcasting free from day-to-day government control while remaining accountable to Parliament.

It informs, educates, and entertains citizens and supports national integration and developmental messaging.

For IB ACIO: Act 1990, functioning from 1997, AIR + Doordarshan under Prasar Bharati.
articles.content_hi:
प्रसार भारती अधिनियम 1990, 1997 से प्रभावी। AIR + Doordarshan।

स्वायत्त सार्वजनिक प्रसारक।

IB ACIO: 1990 Act, 1997, AIR-DD — याद रखें।
articles.question: Prasar Bharati mainly includes which of the following?
articles.question_hi: प्रसार भारती में मुख्यतः क्या शामिल है?
articles.explanation: Prasar Bharati is the umbrella public broadcaster for All India Radio and Doordarshan.
articles.explanation_hi: प्रसार भारती All India Radio और Doordarshan का सार्वजनिक प्रसारक है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: today’s National Broadcasting Day article.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: आज का राष्ट्रीय प्रसारण दिवस लेख।

articles.title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) — Pension for Unorganised Sector
articles.title_hi: अटल पेंशन योजना (APY) — असंगठित क्षेत्र के लिए पेंशन
articles.summary: APY provides a guaranteed minimum pension to workers in the unorganised sector, administered by PFRDA under the NPS architecture.
articles.summary_hi: APY असंगठित क्षेत्र कर्मियों को न्यूनतम गारंटीकृत पेंशन — PFRDA द्वारा NPS ढांचे के तहत।
articles.content:
Atal Pension Yojana was launched in 2015 to provide old-age income security to workers in the unorganised sector.

Subscribers get a guaranteed monthly pension (₹1,000 to ₹5,000) depending on contribution and age of joining. The scheme is administered by the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA).

Eligibility generally focuses on Indian citizens in a specified age band (commonly 18–40 at entry) with a savings bank/post office account and Aadhaar/mobile linkage as per norms.

For IB ACIO: launch 2015, PFRDA, guaranteed pension slabs, unorganised sector focus.
articles.content_hi:
APY 2015। असंगठित क्षेत्र। गारंटीकृत पेंशन ₹1,000–₹5,000।

PFRDA प्रशासन।

IB ACIO: 2015, PFRDA — याद रखें।
articles.question: Atal Pension Yojana is administered by which authority?
articles.question_hi: अटल पेंशन योजना किस प्राधिकरण द्वारा प्रशासित होती है?
articles.explanation: APY is administered by the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA).
articles.explanation_hi: APY का प्रशासन PFRDA करता है।
articles.moreInfo: NPS is also regulated by PFRDA. EPFO handles EPF for organised sector employees.
articles.moreInfo_hi: NPS भी PFRDA। EPFO संगठित क्षेत्र EPF।

articles.title: Balance of Payments (BoP) — Current and Capital Account
articles.title_hi: भुगतान संतुलन (BoP) — चालू और पूंजी खाता
articles.summary: BoP records all economic transactions of a country with the rest of the world — mainly current account and capital/financial account.
articles.summary_hi: BoP देश के विश्व के साथ सभी आर्थिक लेन-देन दर्ज करता है — मुख्यतः चालू खाता और पूंजी/वित्तीय खाता।
articles.content:
The Balance of Payments is a systematic record of a country’s transactions with the rest of the world over a period.

The Current Account includes trade in goods (merchandise), services, income, and transfers. A Current Account Deficit (CAD) means the country imports more goods/services/income payments than it exports/receives.

The Capital/Financial Account covers investments (FDI, FPI), loans, and banking capital. RBI publishes India’s BoP statistics.

For IB ACIO: Current vs Capital Account, CAD meaning, and RBI as data source.
articles.content_hi:
BoP: विश्व के साथ लेन-देन का रिकॉर्ड।

Current Account: वस्तु, सेवा, आय, हस्तांतरण। Capital Account: FDI/FPI, ऋण।

IB ACIO: CAD, Current vs Capital — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which of the following is part of the Current Account of BoP?
articles.question_hi: निम्न में से क्या BoP के चालू खाते का हिस्सा है?
options: Export and import of goods and services
articles.explanation: Trade in goods and services is recorded in the Current Account.
articles.explanation_hi: वस्तुओं और सेवाओं का व्यापार चालू खाते में दर्ज होता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: FDI routes (18 July), Fiscal Deficit (12 July).

articles.title: Agni Missile Series — India’s Strategic Deterrent
articles.title_hi: अग्नि मिसाइल श्रृंखला — भारत का रणनीतिक निवारण
articles.summary: Agni missiles are DRDO-developed ballistic missiles forming a key part of India’s nuclear deterrence and strategic forces.
articles.summary_hi: अग्नि मिसाइलें DRDO विकसित बैलिस्टिक मिसाइलें — भारत के परमाणु निवारण की रीढ़।
articles.content:
The Agni series is a family of medium to intercontinental-range ballistic missiles developed by DRDO under India’s strategic missile programme.

Variants include Agni-I, II, III, IV, V (and developmental longer-range concepts). Agni-V is an intercontinental-range ballistic missile (ICBM-class) that strengthens India’s credible minimum deterrence.

These missiles are operated under the Strategic Forces Command. Agni complements other systems such as Prithvi and submarine-launched systems linked to the nuclear triad.

For IB ACIO: DRDO developer, Agni-V ICBM-class range, Strategic Forces Command.
articles.content_hi:
अग्नि श्रृंखला: DRDO बैलिस्टिक मिसाइल। Agni-V ICBM श्रेणी।

Strategic Forces Command। परमाणु त्रिकोण से जुड़ा।

IB ACIO: DRDO, Agni-V — याद रखें।
articles.question: Agni-series ballistic missiles are developed by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: अग्नि श्रृंखला बैलिस्टिक मिसाइलें किस संगठन द्वारा विकसित?
articles.explanation: The Agni missile series is developed by DRDO.
articles.explanation_hi: अग्नि मिसाइल श्रृंखला DRDO द्वारा विकसित है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Agni-Prime test (9 July), INS Arihant nuclear triad (17 July).

articles.title: SSLV — ISRO’s Small Satellite Launch Vehicle
articles.title_hi: SSLV — ISRO का लघु उपग्रह प्रक्षेपण यान
articles.summary: SSLV is designed for low-cost, on-demand launch of small satellites into Low Earth Orbit, complementing PSLV and LVM3.
articles.summary_hi: SSLV कम लागत और मांग पर छोटे उपग्रहों को LEO में प्रक्षेपित करने के लिए — PSLV और LVM3 का पूरक।
articles.content:
The Small Satellite Launch Vehicle (SSLV) is developed by ISRO to provide quick and affordable access to space for small satellites.

It can carry about 500 kg to Low Earth Orbit (mission-dependent) and is designed for shorter preparation time compared to larger vehicles. SSLV supports India’s growing private space and small-sat ecosystem.

ISRO’s launcher family now spans SSLV (small), PSLV (workhorse), and LVM3 (heavy-lift).

For IB ACIO: purpose (small satellites), LEO focus, and place in ISRO’s launcher ladder.
articles.content_hi:
SSLV: छोटे उपग्रह, कम लागत, तेज़ तैयारी। LEO।

ISRO यान: SSLV → PSLV → LVM3।

IB ACIO: small-sat launcher — याद रखें।
articles.question: SSLV is primarily meant to launch which category of satellites?
articles.question_hi: SSLV मुख्यतः किस श्रेणी के उपग्रह प्रक्षेपित करने के लिए है?
articles.explanation: SSLV is ISRO’s dedicated launcher for small satellites.
articles.explanation_hi: SSLV छोटे उपग्रहों के लिए ISRO का समर्पित प्रक्षेपण यान है।

articles.title: CAMPA — Compensatory Afforestation Fund
articles.summary: CAMPA manages funds collected for compensatory afforestation when forest land is diverted for non-forest use.
articles.summary_hi: CAMPA वन भूमि गैर-वन उपयोग के लिए डायवर्ट होने पर प्रतिपूरक वनीकरण हेतु एकत्रित निधि का प्रबंधन करता है।
articles.content:
When forest land is diverted for mining, infrastructure, or other non-forest purposes, user agencies must pay for compensatory afforestation and related net present value (NPV) of forests.

These funds are managed under the Compensatory Afforestation Fund framework; CAMPA (Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority) structures exist at national and state levels under the Compensatory Afforestation Fund Act, 2016.

The objective is to restore green cover and compensate ecological loss from diversion of forests.

For IB ACIO: link to forest diversion, CAF Act 2016, and afforestation purpose.
articles.content_hi:
वन भूमि डायवर्जन पर प्रतिपूरक वनीकरण व NPV।

CAF Act 2016, CAMPA राष्ट्रीय/राज्य स्तर।

IB ACIO: compensatory afforestation, 2016 — याद रखें।
articles.question: CAMPA funds are mainly related to which activity?
articles.question_hi: CAMPA निधि मुख्यतः किस गतिविधि से संबंधित है?
options_hi: वन डायवर्जन के बाद प्रतिपूरक वनीकरण
articles.explanation: CAMPA manages funds for compensatory afforestation when forests are diverted.
articles.explanation_hi: CAMPA वन डायवर्जन पर प्रतिपूरक वनीकरण की निधि का प्रबंधन करता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Wildlife Protection Act 1972, Project Tiger/Elephant editions.

articles.title: Speaker of the Lok Sabha — Role and Election
articles.summary: The Speaker is the presiding officer of the Lok Sabha, elected by its members, and decides on money bills and floor conduct.
articles.summary_hi: अध्यक्ष लोकसभा के सभापति, सदस्यों द्वारा निर्वाचित — धन विधेयक और सदन व्यवस्था पर निर्णय।
articles.content:
The Speaker of the Lok Sabha is elected by the members of the Lok Sabha from among themselves (Article 93). A Deputy Speaker is also elected.

The Speaker maintains order in the House, decides whether a bill is a Money Bill (Article 110), and allows adjournment motions, questions, and other parliamentary devices as per rules.

The Speaker does not vote in the first instance but can exercise a casting vote in case of a tie. Resignation is submitted to the Deputy Speaker.

For IB ACIO: Article 93, Money Bill certification (Art. 110), and casting vote.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 93 — लोकसभा अध्यक्ष। धन विधेयक: धारा 110।

टाई पर निर्णायक मत। इस्तीफा Deputy Speaker को।

IB ACIO: Article 93, 110 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Who certifies whether a bill is a Money Bill in Parliament?
articles.question_hi: संसद में किसी विधेयक के धन विधेयक होने का प्रमाणन कौन करता है?
articles.explanation: The Speaker of the Lok Sabha certifies a bill as a Money Bill under Article 110.
articles.explanation_hi: लोकसभा अध्यक्ष धारा 110 के तहत धन विधेयक प्रमाणित करते हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Vice-President as Rajya Sabha Chairman (22 July).

articles.title: Income Tax Day — 24 July (Preview)
articles.summary: Income Tax Day (24 July) marks the introduction of income tax in India in 1860 by Sir James Wilson; observed by the Income Tax Department.
articles.summary_hi: आयकर दिवस (24 जुलाई) भारत में 1860 में सर जेम्स विल्सन द्वारा आयकर शुरू होने को चिह्नित करता है।
articles.content:
Income Tax Day is observed in India on 24 July. It commemorates the introduction of income tax in India in 1860 by Sir James Wilson (to overcome financial difficulties after the 1857 revolt).

Today, direct taxes are administered by the Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) under the Department of Revenue, Ministry of Finance. Income-tax law is governed mainly by the Income-tax Act, 1961 (with ongoing reforms).

The day is used to promote tax awareness, voluntary compliance, and taxpayer services.

For IB ACIO: date (24 July), year (1860), Sir James Wilson, and CBDT.
articles.content_hi:
24 जुलाई — Income Tax Day। 1860 में Sir James Wilson।

CBDT, वित्त मंत्रालय। Income-tax Act 1961।

IB ACIO: 24 July, 1860 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Income Tax Day in India is observed on:
articles.question_hi: भारत में आयकर दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: Income Tax Day is observed on 24 July every year.
articles.explanation_hi: आयकर दिवस हर वर्ष 24 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Upcoming: Kargil Vijay Diwas on 26 July.
